mapper.select:
SELECT DEPT_CD FROM TC_USER WHERE DEPT_CD IN
#{item}

SELECT DEPT_CD FROM TC_DEPT WHERE DEPT_CD IN
#{item}

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS ( SELECT dept_cd, dept_nm, dept_type_cd, prnt_dept_cd, comp_class_cd, comp_type_cd, dept_desc, use_yn, 1 AS level FROM TC_DEPT WHERE dept_cd = #{deptCd} UNION ALL SELECT d.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, d.dept_type_cd, d.prnt_dept_cd, d.comp_class_cd, d.comp_type_cd, d.dept_desc, d.use_yn, 1 + level AS level FROM TC_DEPT d INNER JOIN cte ON cte.prnt_dept_cd = d.dept_cd ) SELECT dept_cd, dept_nm, dept_type_cd AS deptTypeCd, prnt_dept_cd AS prntDeptCd, comp_class_cd AS compClassCd, comp_type_cd AS companyTypeCd, dept_desc AS deptDesc, use_yn, level FROM cte ORDER BY level DESC

SELECT A.dept_cd AS deptCd, A.dept_nm AS deptNm, A.prnt_dept_cd AS prntDeptCd, B.dept_nm AS prntDeptNm, A.dept_type_cd AS deptTypeCd, A.comp_type_cd AS companyTypeCd, A.comp_class_cd AS compClassCd, A.dept_desc AS deptDesc, A.use_yn AS useYn, 0 AS level FROM TC_DEPT A LEFT OUTER JOIN TC_DEPT B ON A.PRNT_DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD

SELECT c.dept_nm AS company, d.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, d.dept_type_cd, d.prnt_dept_cd, d.comp_class_cd, d.comp_type_cd, d.dept_desc, d.use_yn FROM TC_DEPT d JOIN TC_DEPT c ON d.prnt_dept_cd = c.dept_cd WHERE d.dept_cd = #{deptCd}
SELECT func_find_company(dept_cd) AS company, dept_cd, dept_nm, dept_type_cd, prnt_dept_cd, comp_class_cd, comp_type_cd, dept_desc, use_yn FROM TC_DEPT
SELECT * FROM TC_DEPT WHERE DEPT_TYPE_CD = 'C'

SELECT c.dept_nm AS company, d.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, d.dept_type_cd, d.prnt_dept_cd, d.comp_class_cd, d.comp_type_cd, d.dept_desc, d.use_yn FROM TC_DEPT d JOIN TC_DEPT c ON d.prnt_dept_cd = c.dept_cd WHERE d.dept_type_cd = 'D' AND d.prnt_dept_cd IS NOT NULL AND (CASE WHEN #{compTypeCd} IN ('C','P') THEN (d.comp_type_cd = #{compTypeCd}) ELSE (1 = 1) END)

SELECT c.dept_nm AS company, d.dept_cd, d.dept_nm, d.dept_type_cd, d.prnt_dept_cd, d.comp_class_cd, d.comp_type_cd, d.dept_desc, d.use_yn FROM TC_DEPT d JOIN TC_DEPT c ON d.prnt_dept_cd = c.dept_cd WHERE d.dept_type_cd = 'D' AND d.prnt_dept_cd IS NOT NULL AND (d.dept_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.dept_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT * FROM v_organization_structure WHERE COMPANY_CD = #{companyCd} AND DEPT_TYPE_CD != 'C'
SELECT * FROM v_organization_structure WHERE DEPT_TYPE_CD != 'C'
mapper.update: UPDATE TC_DEPT SET DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}, DEPT_TYPE_CD = #{deptTypeCd}, DEPT_DESC = #{deptDesc}, PRNT_DEPT_CD = #{prntDeptCd}, COMP_CLASS_CD = #{compClassCd}, COMP_TYPE_CD = #{companyTypeCd}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = #{modDt} WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
